ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Lime, flesh without skin, without seeds, raw
Pumpkin (cucurbita moschata), flesh without skin, raw

ingredients_text: 69% Vegetable Chilli (Water, 5% Red Lentils, 5% Carrots, 5% Cooked Black Turtle Beans, 5% Cooked Red Kidney Beans, 5% Onion, 5% Red Pepper, 5% Sweet Potato, 4% Tomato Paste, 3% Grilled Red Pepper, Rapeseed Oil, Spices, Modified Maize Starch, Textured Soya Protein, Brown Sugar, Salt, Garlic Purée, Lime Juice, Habanero Red Chili Purée, Coriander Leaf, Caramelised Sugar Syrup, Oregano, Yeast Extract), 31% Cauliflower Rice (67% Cauliflower, Butternut Squash).
